mapper.sql: id, agent_id, task_name, description, cron_expression, task_param, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_task_schedule (agent_id, task_name, description, cron_expression, task_param, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{taskName}, #{description}, #{cronExpression}, #{taskParam}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_agent_task_schedule SET agent_id = #{agentId}, task_name = #{taskName}, description = #{description}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, task_param = #{taskParam}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_agent_task_schedule ORDER BY id DESC
